recommendations.title: Cindy La Regia
recommendations.overview: When Cindy decides that she doesn't want to marry her boyfriend, she runs to Mexico City, where new friendships and unexpected paths teach her that there are so much more possibilities on her life and her talent than she imagines.

recommendations.title: Wish Dragon
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Determined teen Din is longing to reconnect with his childhood best friend when he meets a wish-granting dragon who shows him the magic of possibilities.

recommendations.title: So Young
recommendations.overview: Although new friendships and new love await her, a college freshman discovers that university life is not as simple as she had hoped.

recommendations.title: 5 Centimeters per Second
recommendations.overview: Three moments in Takaki's life: his relationship with Akari and their forced separation; his friendship with Kanae, who is secretly in love with him; the demands and disappointments of adulthood, an unhappy life in a cold city.

recommendations.title: Out of Africa
recommendations.overview: Tells the life story of Danish author Karen Blixen, who at the beginning of the 20th century moved to Africa to build a new life for herself. The film is based on her 1937 autobiographical novel.

recommendations.title: Are You There God? It's Me, Margaret.
recommendations.overview: When her family moves from New York City to New Jersey, an 11-year-old girl navigates new friends, feelings, and the beginning of adolescence.

recommendations.title: Joe's Apartment
recommendations.overview: A nice guy has just moved to New York and discovers that he must share his run-down apartment with a couple thousand singing, dancing cockroaches.

recommendations.title: A Mermaid in Paris
recommendations.overview: A man rescues a mermaid in Paris and slowly falls in love with her.

recommendations.title: Ride Your Wave
recommendations.overview: Hinako is a surf-loving college student who has just moved to a small seaside town. When a sudden fire breaks out at her apartment building, she is rescued by Minato, a handsome firefighter, and the two soon fall in love.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.
